popularStory.headline: Alfonso VIII of Castile - the Good
popularStory.description:
Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
Alfonso VIII
King of Castile and Toledo
Reign 31 August 1158 – 5 October 1214
Predecessor Sancho III
Successor Henry I
Consort Eleanor of England

zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis VIII Roi de France於1187年9月5日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲時，他的父親Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France22歲，母親Isabelle De Hainaut Reine des Francs17歲。他於1200年5月23日與Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia在法國豪-諾門迪艾波吉莫特結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1226年11月8日在法國奧維普-德-o蒙希享年39歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louis VIII Roi de France于1187年9月5日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲时，他的父亲Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France22岁，母亲Isabelle De Hainaut Reine des Francs17岁。他于1200年5月23日与Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia在法国豪-諾門迪艾波吉莫特结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1226年11月8日在法国奧維普-德-o蒙希享年39岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

nameMeanings.name: VIII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine pet form of   Vivien   and   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Louis VIII Roi de France was born on 5 September 1187, in Paris, Île-de-France, France, his father, Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France, was 22 and his mother, Isabelle De Hainaut Reine des Francs, was 17. He married Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia on 23 May 1200, in Port-Mort, Eure, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 November 1226, in Montpensier, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, at the age of 39, and was buried in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis VIII Roi de France est né le 5 septembre 1187, à Paris, Île-de-France, France, son père, Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Isabelle De Hainaut Reine des Francs, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia le 23 mai 1200, à Port-Mort, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 novembre 1226, à Montpensier, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louis VIII Roi de France am 5. September 1187 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France 22 und seine Mutter Isabelle De Hainaut Reine des Francs 17. Er hat am 23. Mai 1200 in Port-Mort, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. November 1226 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Montpensier, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis VIII Roi de France è nato il il 5 settembre 1187 nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle De Hainaut Reine des Francs, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia il 23 maggio 1200, nel Port-Mort, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 novembre 1226, nel Montpensier, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Louis VIII Roi de Franceが1187年9月5日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスで生まれた時，父Philippe Auguste II,  roi de Franceは22歳，母Isabelle De Hainaut Reine des Francsは17歳であった。1200年5月23日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアポルト-モートでPrincesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Franciaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1226年11月8日にフランスアウバーグンプウイ-デ-ドoメモントペンシエルで39歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-サイント-デニスサイント-デニスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Louis VIII Roi de France(이)가 1187년 9월 5일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle De Hainaut Reine des Francs(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1200년 5월 23일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 포트-모르트에서 Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1226년 11월 8일 프랑스 오버그니 푸이-데-드o 몽펜시어에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-세인트-데니스 세인트-데니스에 묻혔다.

mn.5 September 1187–8 November 1226: 1187 оны Есдүгээр сарын 5–1226 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 8

pt.5 September 1187–8 November 1226: 5 de setembro de 1187–8 de novembro de 1226
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis VIII Roi de France nasceu em 5 de setembro de 1187, em Paris, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle De Hainaut Reine des Francs, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia em 23 de maio de 1200, em Port-Mort, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1226, em Montpensier, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, França, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis VIII Roi de France родился 5 сентября 1187 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle De Hainaut Reine des Francs, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia 23 мая 1200 г. в местности порт-морт, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 ноября 1226 г. в местности монтпенсиир, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргн, Франция в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-денис, сине-сеинт-денис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.5 September 1187–8 November 1226: 5 de septiembre de 1187–8 de noviembre de 1226
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis VIII Roi de France nació el 5 de septiembre de 1187, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, Philippe Auguste II,  roi de France, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Isabelle De Hainaut Reine des Francs, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia el 23 de mayo de 1200, en Port-Mort, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de noviembre de 1226, en Montpensier, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.
